hero.lead: FootballLive turns your iPhone into a football command center — real-time scores on Dynamic Island, deep H2H stats, trending Shorts news, and comprehensive standings across top leagues worldwide.
features.title: Six powerful features, one perfect app.
features.sub: From live scores on Dynamic Island to viral highlight shorts — FootballLive brings the entire stadium to the palm of your hand.
features.f1_desc: Scores update in real-time directly on Dynamic Island and Lock Screen. No need to open the app — every goal appears right before your eyes.
features.f2_desc: Scroll through highlight videos, beautiful goals, and hot transfer news in TikTok-style — endless scrolling, endless fun.
features.f3_desc: Compare head-to-head form, starting lineups, and detailed match history between any two teams before every game.
features.f4_desc: Track standings across all major leagues: Premier League, La Liga, Serie A, Champions League, and 100+ other competitions.
features.f5_desc: Pick your favorite teams and leagues to receive personalized score alerts, fixture updates, and news — a fully tailored experience.
features.f6_desc: Aggregated multimedia football news from trusted sources — 24/7 updates on everything from transfer markets to behind-the-scenes club content.
screens.title: A premium, dark-themed interface.
screens.sub: Beautiful visuals, smooth transitions, and a layout that feels right at home on every iPhone and iPad.
privacy_section.title: Your data is always protected.
privacy_section.sub: FootballLive requires no account creation. All personalization preferences are stored locally on your device.
privacy_section.check1: The app does not collect emails, phone numbers, or any PII.
privacy_section.check2: We only collect anonymous Device Tokens for real-time score push notifications.
privacy_section.check3: You can reject ad tracking (ATT) and disable notifications at any time.
privacy_section.check4: Favorite team selections are stored on-device and deleted when you remove the app.
cta.title: Experience real-time football today.
cta.subtitle: Download FootballLive and turn every match into an unforgettable moment — right on your lock screen.
footer.tagline: Real-Time Football Tracker. Built for iPhone and iPad with user experience at its core.
privacy.page_sub: We are committed to protecting your privacy when using FootballLive.
privacy.intro: Thank you for using FootballLive. We are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.
privacy.s1_li1: Device & Technical Data: When you use Live Activities and Dynamic Island, the system requires Push Notification permission. We only collect anonymous Device Tokens to send real-time score data.
privacy.s1_li2: Usage Data & Preferences: For Custom Favorites to work (tracking leagues, teams, players), we store these preferences locally on your device or link them with an anonymous device ID for experience syncing.
privacy.s1_li3: No Account Required: The app currently does not require login via email, phone number, or any personally identifiable information (PII).
privacy.s2_li1: Advertising Services: The free version of the app contains ads. Advertising partners (e.g., Google AdMob) may use cookies or device IDs (IDFA) to display relevant ads. You can reject ad tracking (App Tracking Transparency) in iOS settings.
privacy.s2_li2: Analytics Providers: We use analytics tools (such as Firebase Analytics) to improve experience flows (Shorts Feed, Media Feed). This data is completely anonymous.
privacy.s3_li1: You have full control to enable/disable Live Activities and Push Notifications in your device Settings.
privacy.s3_li2: All preference data (Favorites) can be easily deleted by uninstalling the app or clearing the cache in settings.
terms.page_sub: By downloading and using FootballLive, you agree to the following terms.
terms.s1_p1: FootballLive provides real-time football scores, news, statistics, and standings for personal reference and entertainment purposes.
terms.s1_p2: We are not a betting or gambling platform and do not encourage the use of in-app data for illegal purposes.
terms.s2_li1: Independence: FootballLive is an independent tool. We are NOT affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any football organization, league (Premier League, FIFA, UEFA, etc.), or third-party application.
terms.s2_li2: Intellectual Property: All product names, logos, team names, player images, and trademarks appearing in the app are the property of their respective owners. We use them under Fair Use for news purposes only.
terms.s2_li3: Media & Shorts Sources: Videos, news, and multimedia content in Trending Shorts and Football Media Feed are aggregated from authorized third-party sources. We do not hold copyright to this content.
terms.s3_li1: FootballLive offers a Premium Membership that removes ads and unlocks advanced features.
terms.s3_li2: Payment: Subscription fees will be charged to your Apple ID account upon purchase confirmation.
terms.s3_li3: Auto-Renewal: Subscriptions auto-renew unless you disable this at least 24 hours before the current period ends. You can manage cancellation in your Apple Account Settings (App Store Subscriptions).
terms.s4_p1: While we strive to update data (Live Scores, H2H, Lineups) in real-time and as accurately as possible, FootballLive does not guarantee 100% accuracy of all statistics. We will not be liable for any losses arising from the use of app data.
legal.contact_desc: If you have any questions about the Privacy Policy or Terms of Service, please contact us via email:
support.page_sub: We are always ready to listen and support you throughout your FootballLive experience.
support.intro: If you encounter any issues or have suggestions to improve the app, please refer to the channels below.
support.tech_li1: If Live Activities is not working or scores are updating slowly, please try restarting the app or checking your network connection.
support.tech_li2: To report a bug or technical issue, you can submit a request directly through the "Feedback" feature in the app's Settings.
support.data_desc: Although the app does not store personal accounts, if you have any privacy concerns or wish to request deletion of data linked to your device from our analytics servers, please contact us via email below with the subject line "Data Request".
support.copyright_li1: All requests related to business partnerships, DMCA Takedown notices, or media partnerships.
support.copyright_li2: Please attach documents verifying legal ownership when reporting copyright infringement.
support.faq.q1: How do I enable Live Scores on Dynamic Island?
support.faq.a1: Open FootballLive, select a live match, and tap the "Follow Match" button. Scores will automatically appear on Dynamic Island and Lock Screen.
support.faq.a2: Yes. The free version provides full live scores, standings, and news. The Premium plan removes ads and unlocks additional advanced features.
support.faq.a3: We strive to update data in real-time from trusted sources. However, there may be a few seconds of delay depending on your network connection.
support.faq.q4: How do I cancel my Premium subscription?
support.faq.a4: Open iPhone Settings → Tap your Apple ID name → Subscriptions → Select FootballLive → Cancel Subscription.
support.form_sub: Our technical team will respond within 24 hours.
support.email_label: Or contact us directly via email:
form.name: Your name
form.message_placeholder: Describe your issue or suggestion in detail...
form.success: Sent successfully! We will respond via email within 24 hours.
